data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making processes by minimizing choices per page.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design focus on easy-to-reach targets for enhanced usability.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Keeps information processing within the limits of the user’s working memory.

data.title: The Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Improved aesthetic design to foster usability perceptions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations by adhering to common design patterns.
